runs.note: Updated validateScopes to handle both old and new scope formats by mapping old scopes (read, write, admin) to their new equivalents, logging deprecation usage, and filtering granted scopes. This ensures backward compatibility during the 12-month transition period while always returning new scope format in tokens.
